digest.component_or_area: plan-review Pass 4 coaching / project move registry
propositions: Add a project-specific coaching move keyed `project-portability` that triggers only on `project.portability` findings during Pass 4.
The move is defined in project configuration (`.rebar/plan_review_moves.json`) and must not alter built-in move definitions or the packaged MOVE_REGISTRY.
The move must render a locked deterministic template for a validated noun-phrase subject.
The move must be excluded for unrelated or empty trigger sets and admitted only when its trigger intersects surviving findings.
Coaching behavior must remain scoped so unrelated criteria and Pass 1-3 behavior are unaffected.
The move trigger depends on the final activated criterion id from the criterion-integration child.
